concepts.headline: Read what you love until you love to read.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on a warm off-white #faf9f6 canvas. The quote occupies the left 60% of the canvas, set in Inter 600 at 48px with tight letter-spacing of -0.04em, anchored 72px from the left edge and vertically centered with a slight upward offset. Below the quote, a 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) at 120px wide fades to transparent, followed by the attribution 'Naval Ravikant' in DM Mono 13px uppercase letter-spacing 0.07em at #888. The right 40% is reserved as negative space populated with a sparse particle dot network of scattered gray circles at 0.08 opacity connected by 0.5px hairline strokes. The Flywheel wordmark sits bottom-left at 12px DM Mono uppercase #888. 72px padding on all edges.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline text #111, attribution #888, accent bar #d7c8af fading to transparent, particle dots rgba(107,122,124,0.08), structural hairlines #e5e5e5
concepts.reasoning: The post is anchored by a single powerful quote from a named source, making attribution_quote_card the precise modality match. The sparse left-anchored layout with the quote as sole hero element embodies Flywheel's editorial restraint. The warm off-white background, minimal typographic hierarchy, and particle dot texture in the negative space all honor the premium publication aesthetic without any marketing noise.

concepts.headline: The best habit is the one you actually enjoy.
concepts.subtext: Optimizing for curiosity beats optimizing for usefulness. Every time.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement layout on a white #ffffff canvas with a faint FLYWHEEL watermark behind the statement text at 0.03 opacity in 140px bold uppercase. The headline sits at vertical center, Inter 600 at 52px letter-spacing -0.04em, color #111, max-width 700px, centered horizontally. A 2px warm sand accent bar 80px wide is placed above the headline, centered, fading to transparent on both ends. Subtext in Inter 400 18px #555 sits 36px below the headline, centered, max-width 480px. The Flywheel logo mark anchors bottom-center at 13px DM Mono #888. 64px padding all edges. No other decorative elements.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, headline #111, subtext #555, FLYWHEEL watermark rgba(0,0,0,0.03), accent bar #d7c8af, brand mark #888
concepts.reasoning: The meta-lesson at the post's close is the sharpest, most quotable distillation of the entire narrative. A centered bold statement card isolates that single insight with maximum typographic weight. The FLYWHEEL watermark adds depth without clutter, and the near-empty canvas communicates authority through absence, perfectly matching Flywheel's editorial philosophy.

concepts.headline: Curiosity is a better habit system than discipline.
concepts.subtext: Fifty books a year started the day optimizing for 'useful' stopped and optimizing for love began.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on #faf9f6 canvas. A small DM Mono eyebrow label 'On reading' in 11px uppercase letter-spacing 0.07em at #888 sits 72px from top and left edge. The headline follows 20px below in Inter 600 48px letter-spacing -0.04em color #111, max-width 560px. A 2px warm sand accent bar 96px wide sits 28px below the headline, flush left, fading right to transparent. The subtext in Inter 400 18px #555 sits 32px below the accent bar, max-width 520px. The right half of the canvas holds only a sparse particle dot network at 0.07 opacity. The Flywheel wordmark anchors bottom-left at 12px DM Mono #888. 72px padding on all edges.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, eyebrow #888, subtext #555, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots rgba(107,122,124,0.07)
concepts.reasoning: The headline synthesizes the post's core argument into a punchy editorial statement while the subtext grounds it in the concrete detail of 50 books. The left-anchored layout with generous negative space on the right feels like a journal opener, matching Flywheel's premium publication tone. The eyebrow label adds structure without adding noise.

selection_reasoning: The bold statement card best captures Flywheel's editorial identity because it distills the entire post to its irreducible insight and lets white space do the heavy lifting. The FLYWHEEL watermark at near-zero opacity adds a layer of depth that rewards close viewing, the centered composition creates quiet authority, and the near-empty canvas communicates confidence. It avoids any temptation toward list formats or data display that would misrepresent content that is fundamentally a single philosophical point.
